name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Gazer Registry Values
notes: This building block detects when Gazer registry names are discovered.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Gazer Registry Values on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful Registry Modification, System.Service Installed

when the event matches ( LOWER("Registry Key") MATCHES ('.*?\\software\\microsoft\windows\\currentversion\\explorer\\screensaver.*') OR LOWER("Registry Value Data") MATCHES ('.*?\\software\\microsoft\\windows\\currentversion\\explorer\\screensaver.*') ) AND ( LOWER("Registry Key") MATCHES ('.*?119d263d-68fc-1942-3ca3-46b23fa652a0.*') OR LOWER("Registry Value Data") MATCHES ('.*?119d263d-68fc-1942-3ca3-46b23fa652a0.*') OR LOWER("Registry Key") MATCHES ('.*?1dc12691-2b24-2265-435d-735d3b118a70.*') OR LOWER("Registry Value Data") MATCHES ('.*?1dc12691-2b24-2265-435d-735d3b118a70.*') OR LOWER("Registry Key") MATCHES ('.*?28e74bda-4327-31b0-17b9-56a66a818c1d.*') OR LOWER("Registry Value Data") MATCHES ('.*?28e74bda-4327-31b0-17b9-56a66a818c1d.*') OR LOWER("Registry Key") MATCHES ('.*?31ac34a1-2de2-36ac-1f6e-86f43772841f.*') OR LOWER("Registry Value Data") MATCHES ('.*?31ac34a1-2de2-36ac-1f6e-86f43772841f.*') OR LOWER("Registry Key") MATCHES ('.*?3cdc155d-398a-646e-1021-23047d9b4366.*') OR LOWER("Registry Value Data") MATCHES ('.*?3cdc155d-398a-646e-1021-23047d9b4366.*') OR LOWER("Registry Key") MATCHES ('.*?4a3130bd-2608-730f-31a7-86d16ce66100.*') OR LOWER("Registry Value Data") MATCHES ('.*?4a3130bd-2608-730f-31a7-86d16ce66100.*') OR LOWER("Registry Key") MATCHES ('.*?56594fea-5774-746d-4496-6361266c40d0.*') OR LOWER("Registry Value Data") MATCHES ('.*?56594fea-5774-746d-4496-6361266c40d0.*') OR LOWER("Registry Key") MATCHES ('.*?629336e3-58d6-633b-5182-576588cf702a.*') OR LOWER("Registry Value Data") MATCHES ('.*?629336e3-58d6-633b-5182-576588cf702a.*') OR LOWER("Registry Key") MATCHES ('.*?6cee6fe1-10a2-4c33-7e7f-855a51733c77.*') OR LOWER("Registry Value Data") MATCHES ('.*?6cee6fe1-10a2-4c33-7e7f-855a51733c77.*') OR LOWER("Registry Key") MATCHES ('.*?81a03bf8-60aa-4a56-253c-449121d61caf.*') OR LOWER("Registry Value Data") MATCHES ('.*?81a03bf8-60aa-4a56-253c-449121d61caf.*') OR LOWER("Registry Key") MATCHES ('.*?8e9810c5-3014-4678-27ee-3b7a7ac346af.*') OR LOWER("Registry Value Data") MATCHES ('.*?8e9810c5-3014-4678-27ee-3b7a7ac346af.*') ) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Gazer Registry Values on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
